title: Public transport
description: The bus that never comes, the seat you hate sitting next to and the art of pretending to sleep — public transport is a shared experience for millions! See if your commute habits match!

questions.text: Name something people do while waiting for a bus or train.
Name something annoying about other passengers on public transport.

answers.text: loud phone calls in a quiet carriage
taking up two seats with bags
pushing to get on before people exit

questions.text: Name something people say when the bus or train is late.

answers.text: I'm going to be late for work

questions.text: Name a type of passenger that makes everyone uncomfortable.

answers.text: the one talking loudly on the phone
the one taking up too much space
the one who stares at everyone
the one eating a full meal

questions.text: Name something people pretend to do to avoid conversation on transport.

answers.text: close their eyes and pretend to sleep

questions.text: Name something people do on a long train journey.
Name something people complain about on the underground or metro.

answers.text: it is too hot and stuffy
it is packed like sardines in rush hour
there is no signal for the phone

questions.text: Name something people forget when using public transport.

answers.text: to check the last service time
which stop to get off at
their bag or coat on the seat

questions.text: Name something people think but never say on a packed bus.

answers.text: please don't sit next to me
that music is way too loud
please move down — there's space at the back
how is that smell even legal
someone should give up their seat

questions.text: Name a reason people prefer driving over public transport.

answers.text: no other people to deal with
can listen to what you want
can carry as much as you want
